title: Too many ducks
description: This mod add a lot of ducks!
body:
### Too Many Ducks

Too many ducks is a mod that will add 10 ducks to your minecraft to collect! They appear in villages and ruined portals with a 60% chance in chests. Will you be able to collect them all?

![All ducks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cdbb1e582b171c8a01b2d22a32b7ea2b447fcd9.png)

## Ducks
1. Lolo Duck
2. Regular Duck
3. Intelligent Duck
4. Ragged Duck
5. Glitch Duck
6. Duck-Brin
7. Mallard
8. Evil Duck
9. Holy Duck
 10. Polite Duck
